subcodes.first_line: Hearken unto the voice of the sorrow-laden Prisoner, Who from the horizon of the manifest Prison calleth thee and summoneth thee unto truth. Praise be unto the Beloved [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: بشنو ندای مسجون حزین را که از افق سجن مبین ترا ندا مینماید و بحق میخواند حمد کن محبوب
subcodes.subjects: @goodly deeds; actions, @chastisement and requital, @suffering and imprisonment, @service to others; to the Cause of God, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
